mapper.select: SELECT NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "MEMBER" WHERE "MEMBER_DEL_FL" = 'N'), 0) AS "userCount", (SELECT NVL(TO_CHAR(AVG(PUSH_TIME), '00:00'), '00:00') FROM "PUSH" WHERE "IS_ACTIVE" = 'Y') AS "avgPushTime", (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG("PREPARE_TIME"), 1), 0) FROM "PUSH" WHERE "IS_ACTIVE" = 'Y') AS "avgPrepareTime", (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG("SPARE_TIME"), 1), 0) FROM "PUSH" WHERE "IS_ACTIVE" = 'Y') AS "avgTrafficTime" FROM DUAL
